general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage your platform preferences and configuration
general.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values?
general.saveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

organization.title: Organization
organization.name: Organization Name
organization.aboutPlaceholder: Describe what your organization does, what products or services you offer, your mission, values, etc. This information helps the AI assistant provide more contextually relevant responses.
organization.aboutHelper: This information helps AI understand your business context. Max 10,000 characters.
organization.logoRecommended: Recommended: Square image, max 2MB (JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF)
organization.logoUploadError: Failed to upload logo. Please try again.
organization.logoRemoveFailed: Failed to remove logo. Please try again.

platform.title: Platform Settings
platform.defaultLanguageHelper: Default language for new conversations and system messages
platform.timezoneHelper: Used for displaying timestamps and scheduling reports
platform.defaultAgentHelper: Agent to handle conversations when no specific agent is assigned
platform.testModeDescription: When enabled, AI messages require approval before sending to customers. Individual agents can override this setting.
platform.testModeCheckbox: Require approval for AI messages by default
platform.testModeNote: Note: Playground conversations always auto-send regardless of this setting.

confidence.title: AI Confidence Guardrails
confidence.description: Configure how AI responses are evaluated for confidence and accuracy
confidence.thresholdsDescription: Set the minimum confidence scores required for different quality tiers
confidence.recheckHint: When confidence is medium, automatically retrieve more documents and regenerate the response
confidence.escalationHint: When confidence is low, escalate to a human agent instead of sending the AI response
confidence.recheckConfigDescription: Parameters used when rechecking medium-confidence responses
confidence.fallbackMessageHelper: Message shown when confidence is low and escalation is disabled. Will be automatically translated to match conversation language.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteOrgWarning: Once you delete an organization, there is no going back. Please be certain.

deleteOrganization.title: Delete Organization
deleteOrganization.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the organization and all associated data.
deleteOrganization.impact2: Delete all agents, playbooks, and documents
deleteOrganization.impact3: Remove all team members from the organization
deleteOrganization.impact4: Delete all customer data and conversation history

users.title: Team Members
users.description: Manage who has access to your organization
users.searchPlaceholder: Search members by name or email...
users.noMembersFiltered: No members found matching your filters
users.pendingInvitationsDescription: Invitations sent to join your organization
users.messagePlaceholder: Add a personal message to the invitation
users.removeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {email} from the organization? This action cannot be undone.
users.invitationResentDescription: The invitation email has been sent again
users.memberRemovedDescription: {email} has been removed from the organization

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.description: Manage your personal data and exercise your privacy rights under GDPR
privacy.yourRightsDescription: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, export, and delete your personal data
privacy.activeRequestsDescription: Track the status of your privacy requests
privacy.checkSpamFolder: Please check your spam folder or try again later.
privacy.exportYourDataDescription: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format
privacy.processingTimeDescription: Your data export typically takes less than 5 minutes to generate. You'll receive an email with a download link when it's ready.
privacy.deleteYourAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
privacy.deleteWarningDescription: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteItem1: Your account will be permanently deactivated
privacy.deleteItem2: All API keys will be revoked
privacy.deleteItem3: Personal information will be removed or anonymized
privacy.deleteItem4: Some audit logs may be retained (anonymized) for compliance
privacy.privacyInformationDescription: Learn more about how we handle your data
privacy.privacyPolicyDescription: How we collect, use, and protect your data
privacy.dataRetentionPolicyDescription: How long we keep your data
privacy.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.
privacy.finalWarningDescription: You will receive a verification email to confirm this deletion. Click the link in the email to complete the process.
privacy.checkYourEmailDescription: We've sent a verification email to {email}. Click the link in the email to complete your request.
privacy.downloadReadyDescription: Please check your email for the download link

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Manage API tokens for organization-level access
apiTokens.connectionDetailsDescription: Use these when connecting Hay to another platform, such as the Shopify chat widget.
apiTokens.apiTokensDescription: Tokens provide organization-level API access. They can only be viewed once upon creation.
apiTokens.noTokensDescription: Create your first API token to start using the API
apiTokens.createDialogDescription: Generate a new API token for organization-level access. The token will only be shown once.
apiTokens.scopesDescription: Select which API operations this token can perform (not enforced yet)
apiTokens.copyTokenWarning: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again!
apiTokens.importantWarningDescription: This is the only time you'll see this token. Make sure to copy it and store it securely.
apiTokens.editDialogDescription: Update the token name and scopes
apiTokens.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this token? It will stop working immediately.
apiTokens.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this token? This action cannot be undone.
apiTokens.headDescription: Manage API tokens for organization-level access

webchat.title: Webchat Settings
webchat.description: Customize your website chat widget appearance and behavior
webchat.widgetAppearanceDescription: Customize how the chat widget looks on your website
webchat.showGreeting: Show greeting message when chat opens
webchat.greetingMessagePlaceholder: Hello! How can we help you today?
webchat.securityAccessDescription: Control where your widget can be embedded
webchat.allowedDomainsDescription: Enter one domain per line. Use * to allow all domains.
webchat.installationCodeDescription: Add this code to your website before the closing body tag

customerPrivacy.title: Customer Privacy
customerPrivacy.description: Manage GDPR data requests for your customers
customerPrivacy.infoDescription: Organizations can initiate GDPR data export or deletion requests on behalf of their customers. The customer will receive a verification email to confirm the request.
customerPrivacy.checkSpamFolder: Please check your spam folder or try again later.
customerPrivacy.dataRetentionPolicyDescription: Configure automatic anonymization of closed conversations for GDPR compliance
customerPrivacy.retentionHelp: After this period, closed conversations will be anonymized. Messages are deleted but analytics metadata is preserved.
customerPrivacy.retentionWarning: When enabled, closed conversations older than the retention period will be automatically anonymized daily. Messages will be permanently deleted, but conversation metadata is preserved for analytics. Conversations marked with "Legal Hold" are exempt from anonymization.
customerPrivacy.initiateRequestDescription: Start a GDPR data export or deletion request for one of your customers
customerPrivacy.requestHistoryDescription: View and track all customer privacy requests initiated by your organization

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage authentication, access controls, and security policies
security.authenticationDescription: Configure password policies and authentication methods
security.passwordExpirationDescription: Force password change after specified days
security.gracePeriodDescription: Days to set up 2FA before enforcement
security.apiSecurityDescription: Manage API keys and rate limiting
security.requestsPerMinuteDescription: Maximum API requests per minute per API key
security.enableIpWhitelistDescription: Only allow API access from specified IPs
security.deleteApiKeyDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
security.headDescription: Manage authentication, access controls, and security policies

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your personal information and account security
profile.profilePictureDescription: Upload a photo to personalize your profile
profile.photoRecommended: Recommended: Square image, max 2MB (JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF)
profile.profileInformationDescription: Update your name and personal details
profile.emailDescription: Manage your email address used for login and notifications
profile.pendingEmailHelp: Please check your new email inbox and click the verification link to complete the change. The link will expire in 24 hours.
profile.verificationRequiredDescription: You will need to verify the new email address before the change takes effect. A verification link will be sent to your new email address.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure
profile.passwordRequirementsDescription: Your password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
profile.recentSecurityActivityDescription: Monitor recent changes to your account
profile.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
profile.profileUploadFailed: Failed to upload profile picture. Please try again.
profile.profileRemoveFailed: Failed to remove profile picture. Please try again.
profile.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
profile.verificationResent: Verification email resent successfully. Please check your inbox.
profile.passwordChanged: Password changed successfully. A confirmation email has been sent.
profile.headDescription: Manage your profile information and account security

gitConnections.title: Git Connections
gitConnections.description: Connect your Git repositories to install and sync plugins automatically
gitConnections.headDescription: Manage Git repository connections for plugin sync
gitConnections.notConfiguredDescription: Set GITHUB_APP_ID, GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY, and GITHUB_APP_NAME environment variables to enable GitHub integration.
gitConnections.connectionsDescription: GitHub accounts connected to your organization
gitConnections.noConnectionsDescription: Connect a GitHub account to install plugins from your repositories.
gitConnections.reposDescription: Choose a repository to install as a plugin
gitConnections.noReposDescription: This GitHub account has no accessible repositories, or the app doesn't have permission to any repos.
gitConnections.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this GitHub account? Associated plugins will remain installed.
gitConnections.disconnectAndRemoveConfirm: Disconnect this GitHub account and remove all plugins installed from it?
gitConnections.noGitPlugins: No plugins installed from Git yet
gitConnections.noGitPluginsDescription: Connect a GitHub account and install a plugin from a repository.
